name: pbg-bioreactordesign
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for BioReactorDesign (BiRD) bioreactor simulation

name: pbg-caspule
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for CASPULE (a LAMMPS variant with dynamic bond formation/breaking)

checks.name: open-mpi-4
checks.description: OpenMPI 4.x runtime — the lammps PyPI wheel was built against libmpi.12 (OpenMPI 4 ABI)

darwin.notes: Default open-mpi 5.x is ABI-incompatible with the lammps wheel; the @4 formula provides libmpi.12

checks.name: lammps-importable
checks.description: Validate that the lammps Python wheel can dlopen its native library
checks.notes: If this fails after open-mpi-4 is installed, the lammps wheel may need rebuilding from source: pip install --no-binary lammps lammps

name: pbg-cellpack
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for cellPACK — mesoscale molecular packing (recipes → 3D molecular assemblies)

name: pbg-comets
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for COMETS (dynamic FBA + 2D spatial microbial ecosystems)

name: pbg-composite-nfsim-caspule
description: Process-bigraph composite: CASPULE bond-aware MD coupled to NFSim rule-based kinetics through a configurable observable detector that converts spatial bond clusters into non-spatial species counts.

name: pbg-compucell3d
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for the CompuCell3D multicellular simulation environment

name: pbg-lammps
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for the LAMMPS molecular dynamics simulator

name: pbg-martini
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for the Martini coarse-grained force field — membrane systems, micelles, protein-lipid complexes, and vesicles

name: pbg-medyan
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for the MEDYAN cytoskeleton simulator: pure-Python re-implementation + a subprocess-driven bridge to the real MEDYAN C++ binary (with checkpoint-restart and HDF5 vesicle support).

name: pbg-mem3dg
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for Mem3DG membrane mechanics simulator

name: pbg-minimal-cell-4dwcm
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for a minimal-cell whole-cell model (4D-WCM)

name: pbg-nfsim
description: A process-bigraph wrapper for BioNetGen/NFSim

name: pbg-physicell
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for PhysiCell agent-based multicellular simulation

name: pbg-readdy
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for the ReaDDy particle-based reaction-diffusion simulator

name: pbg-smoldyn
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for the Smoldyn particle-based spatial stochastic simulator

name: pbg-tellurium
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for Tellurium / libroadrunner SBML & Antimony simulation

name: pbg-vcell-fvsolver
description: process-bigraph wrapper around pyvcell / pyvcell-fvsolver — VCell's finite-volume 3D reaction-diffusion PDE solver as a PBG Process

name: pbg-yalla
description: Process-bigraph wrapper for a NumPy port of ya||a's pair-wise agent-based morphogenesis simulator

name: spatio-flux
description: spatio-temporal microbial simulations with Vivarium 2.0

name: v2ecoli
description: Whole-cell E. coli model in Vivarium 2
